subcodes.first_line: This is the Book from the Wronged One unto him who hath chosen for himself a path unto the All-Merciful, that it may seize him from his self and draw him nigh [3.5s]... ...Blessed art thou, O My servant, inasmuch as thou hast recognized the Truth, and withdrawn from him who repudiated the All-Merciful
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اتخذ الی الرحمن سبیلا لیاخذه عن نفسه و یجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
